race.comment: AGENT REMINGTON (5) is on debut today following a strong victory at the trials recently under Jason Whiting, who remains on board the gelding today. The inside draw should see him get every chance in the run and this doesn't look like an overly strong maiden. Can make an immediate impact. WATERSHED WISDOM (12) went back to 1000m last start and finished 1.2L off the winner. Back up to 1100m today is no issue and she has enough speed to roll across from out wide. Can be in the finish once again. BELLE BELLE (9) disappointed out in trip last time out but returns to the track and trip where he performed well last time out. On the quick turnaround here and a better draw should suit. Won't be far away. TRAILER TRUCK (6) comes here first-up with a couple of trials under his belt. Fresh figures last campaign stack up. Keep safe. NEXT DESTINATION (10) gets the blinkers on here third-up and can improve back to an easier race.
